title: Simple Harvest
description: Simply right-click fully grown crops (including Sniffer and vertical crops) to instantly harvest and auto-replant them! Requires Fabric API.
body:
# Right Click to Harvest 🌾
**Effortless, Fast, and Seamless Farming for Your Server!**

Stop breaking your crops by accident! **Right Click to Harvest** is a premium, lightweight, server-side utility mod that completely transforms your Minecraft farming experience. With smart replanting, instant melon/pumpkin harvesting, and vertical crop scaling, this is the only farming companion you'll ever need.

![Right Click to Harvest Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8cb0af97d13962f5ea4a33931399dd2b1244ead.png)

---

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Fabric API is Required!**
> This mod requires the **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** to be installed. Without it, your game or server will not initialize. Please ensure it is placed in your `mods/` folder alongside this mod.

> [!NOTE]
> **Server-Side Only & Single Player Support**
> You only need to install this on the **server**! Players connecting with a 100% vanilla Minecraft client can use all features immediately and flawlessly. It also works perfectly out-of-the-box in **Single Player** (where both this mod and Fabric API must be in your local `mods/` folder).

---

## ✨ Features

*   **⚡ Right-Click Harvesting**: Simply right-click any fully grown crop to harvest its drops instantly. The mod automatically replants a seed for you on the spot!
*   **🌱 Automatic Seed Consumption**: Replanting is realistic—it consumes exactly **1 seed** (or crop item) from the harvested drops. If a crop only drops its product and no seed (due to bad luck or low fortune), it won't replant unless a seed is available.
*   **🔌 Zero Configuration (Plug & Play)**: No complex config files, permissions, or commands. Just drop the JAR into your server's `mods` folder and start farming.
*   **🪓 Save Tool Durability**: Melon and pumpkin instant-breaking does not consume your tool's durability, making large-scale melon/pumpkin farms completely cost-free to harvest manually.

---

## 🌾 Supported Crops & Blocks

| Category | Icon | Crops | Behavior |
| :--- | :---: | :--- | :--- |
| **Standard Crops** | 🌾 | Wheat, Carrots, Potatoes, Beetroots | Harvests drops, plays break particles/sounds, and automatically resets the crop age to `0` by consuming 1 seed. |
| **Nether & Jungle** | 🍫 | Cocoa Beans, Nether Wart | Instantly harvests fully grown Cocoa pods on Jungle logs and mature Nether Wart, resetting their growth stage. |
| **Ancient Crops** | 🌱 | Torchflowers, Pitcher Plants | Full support for Sniffer ancient crops! Automatically replants Torchflower Seeds and Pitcher Pods upon harvest. |
| **Stems** | 🍉 | Melons, Pumpkins | Instantly breaks the melon or pumpkin block on right-click without consuming axe durability, dropping them straight to you. |
| **Vertical Crops** | 🎋 | Sugar Cane, Cactus | Traces the column down to the base block, **preserving the bottom block** to allow future growth, and instantly harvests/drops all blocks above it! |

---

## 🛠️ Supported Minecraft Versions & Compatibility

We build separate, highly optimized Jars tailored for the specific mappings and Java requirements of every major release:

| Minecraft Version | Release Series | Java Runtime | Mappings Used | Status |
| :---: | :--- | :---: | :---: | :---: |
| **1.20.x** | All versions from `1.20` through `1.20.6` | `Java 17` | Yarn Mappings | **LATEST STABLE** |
| **1.21.x** | All versions from `1.21` through `1.21.11` | `Java 21` | Yarn Mappings | **LATEST STABLE** |
| **26.1.x** | "Tiny Takeover" Drop Series | `Java 25` | Mojang Mappings | **COMPATIBLE** |
| **26.2-pre-2** | "Chaos Cubed" Drop Series | `Java 25` | Mojang Mappings | **COMPATIBLE** |

---

## 📦 Quick Installation Guide

1.  Make sure your server or client is running the **Fabric Loader**.
2.  Download the JAR file matching your Minecraft version from the releases tab.
3.  Place the mod JAR (along with the corresponding version of **Fabric API**) into your `mods/` directory.
4.  Restart your server/game and enjoy effortless harvesting!
